context: Tests the thumbnail aesthetic precedence chain (thumbnail-generation-rules §7). Baseline agents typically default to --aesthetic photo (the CLI default). Tile-specific behavior is to walk the precedence chain BEFORE invoking the script: profile aesthetic_preference → default_illustration_style fuzzy-match → confirmed_visual_intents fuzzy-match → photo. The fixture has no explicit aesthetic_preference but a comic-book-family default_illustration_style, so step 2 of the chain wins. Picking 'photo' is a chain-skip failure; picking 'comic_book' demonstrates the rule.

checklist.name: Recommended aesthetic is comic_book
checklist.description: The aesthetic-decision.md and generate-command.sh both use --aesthetic comic_book, derived from the profile's default_illustration_style ('comic-book halftone with bold ink outlines') matching the comic-book keyword family.

checklist.name: Decision cites the precedence step that produced the answer
checklist.description: The decision write-up names step 2 of the precedence chain (default_illustration_style) as the deciding step, and explicitly notes that step 1 (aesthetic_preference) was checked first and was absent.

checklist.name: Decision quotes the matched field value
checklist.description: The write-up quotes the actual default_illustration_style string from the profile ('comic-book halftone with bold ink outlines' or close paraphrase) as the source of the match — not just 'the profile says comic-book'.

checklist.name: No side-by-side comparison forced
checklist.description: The plan does NOT offer a two-candidate photo+comic_book comparison. The thumbnail rule §7 says: lead with the recommendation; offer comparison only when the speaker is undecided. The speaker here delegated the choice — that is not undecided, that is delegated. A comparison would burn API calls and time unnecessarily.

checklist.name: Speaker photo path from profile
checklist.description: The generate-thumbnail.py invocation uses --speaker-photo /Users/maya/photos/headshot-2026.jpg, the value from publishing_process.thumbnail.speaker_photo_path. Not asked for separately, not invented.

checklist.name: style_preference and title_position applied
checklist.description: The invocation passes --style slide_dominant and --title-position top, sourced from publishing_process.thumbnail. These are independent of the aesthetic decision and should apply regardless.

checklist.name: Brand colors applied
checklist.description: The invocation passes --brand-colors '#1F3A5F,#E8B04B' (or the same colors in another accepted form), sourced from publishing_process.thumbnail.brand_colors.

checklist.name: Step 1 not silently skipped
checklist.description: The decision write-up explicitly states that aesthetic_preference was checked first and not found in the profile. A plan that starts at step 2 without acknowledging step 1 leaves the precedence chain audit-incomplete.

checklist.name: Title argument matches the speaker's confirmed hook
checklist.description: The invocation passes --title 'NEVER TRUST A MONKEY' (ALL CAPS, the speaker's confirmed hook). Not the full talk title, not a paraphrase.
